description.short: AI project manager for the At Home email marketing creative team.
description.full: Pim is an AI-powered project manager assistant for the At Home email marketing creative team. Ask Pim about FY27 email project review dates, assignments, proof statuses, and upcoming deadlines. Pim pulls live data from Workfront and can post the weekly Friday digest of upcoming review priorities.

commands.title: reviews this week
commands.description: Show projects in this week's Creative/MKT/Exec reviews

commands.title: reviews next week
commands.description: Show projects in next week's reviews

commands.title: proof status
commands.description: Check proof status for a project or week

commands.title: what's Meagan working on
commands.description: Show projects assigned to a designer or copywriter
